name: 6Ft LED Integrated Cooler Light – 40W – 6500K
description: ZION LED USA Integrated LED Cooler Fixtures offer an energy-efficient lighting solution specifically designed for cooler environments. Built with a durable aluminum and polycarbonate housing, these fixtures are vapor-proof, making them ideal replacements for traditional fluorescent bulbs in refrigerated or moisture-prone areas. Featuring an innovative end-to-end connectable design, each fixture can be linked directly or daisy-chained, allowing you to connect up to 9 lights on a single power cord. With a total connection capacity of up to 150 fixtures using bare wire, these lights provide maximum flexibility and simplified installation for large-scale applications.
short_desc: Specifications: Wattage: 40W Lumens: 5000 lm Lumens Efficacy: 125LM/Watt CCT: 6500K Input Voltage: 100-250VAC, 50/60Hz Operating Frequency: 50/60Hz Power Factor: ≥0.90 CRI: ≥80 Operating Temperature: -4ºF TO 104ºF Dimensions: 6FT(72) Projected Hours (Life Span): ≥50,000 Hours Weight: 1.24LBS Housing Color: Silver Mounting Type: Wall, Ceiling, Edges Cover: Clear/Stripe Housing Material: Aluminum pc Application: Cooler Waterproof Rating: WET (IP65) Certificates: ETL, DLC Warranty: 3 Years
